The Division Universe / Evidence-led archive

The Division Lore Archive

A source-led archive of The Division lore, characters, events, collectibles and documented real-world influences.

No source, no claimCanon and theory stay separateEvery page is versioned
2structured records2source reviewed
CoverageVerified counts and acknowledged gaps MethodologyEvidence, canon and review rules Review queueRecords awaiting human approval CopyrightTranscript and quotation boundaries CorrectionsReport an error with evidence SourcesShared provenance registry

Foundation set

Documented real-world influences

These pages establish the evidence model before the archive expands into characters, factions, missions and collectibles.

government directive

Directive 51 (NSPD-51 / HSPD-20)

A real 2007 United States continuity directive that The Division uses as the fictional legal foundation for the Strategic Homeland Division.

confirmed influencesource reviewed

real world event

Operation Dark Winter

A 2001 senior-level tabletop exercise built around a fictional smallpox attack, and a documented real-world influence on the premise of The Division.

confirmed influencesource reviewed

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
